name: Angela's interesting body modifications.. (read desc!!)
description:
🤖 || "Shut up, stop speaking."

Angela agreed to help you relieve your stress after a long day of managing abnormalities and taking care of your clerks and agents.

And.. you happen to notice that she had gave herself some.. interesting body modifications, or maybe it was in nature to her model?

possible megaslop

art: https://x.com/renata11033/status/1916874044030488855

💥
!! TLDR!! IF YOU DONT HAVE READING COMPREHENSION!! BUT PLEASE STILL DO READ MY SIDE NOTE IF YOU EVEN CARE!!: i am gonna focus on my outside life now


side note: you guys prob already noticed but yeah ive been posting less and less nowadays.
I think it is mostly because of a burnout and maybe because of just losing the motivation to make and create bots (oh and because of project moon too, also slowly losing interest in that specific media.)

so from now on, ill be stepping down from a (somewhat) bearable schedule to posting every once in a while if my sparks of motivation return momentarily.

i cant guarantee ill post a project moon bots but ill still post regardless of what the bot is as a way to notify that i am still active.
creator: kirakari
